name: Boston Pork Butt Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the meat, garlic powder, cumin, salt, and black pepper in a large pot.
2. Add water to cover the meat completely.
3. Simmer until the meat is tender.
4. Remove from heat and add the remaining ingredients. Simmer until everything is well combined.
5. Stir in flour to thicken the sauce.
6. Pour into pint jars and freeze. Makes about 12 pints.
